theme.reasoning: Fits an executive-level Product Manager by combining analytical precision (Swiss/Mono) with storytelling elegance (Editorial Serif). Breaks the purple/Inter AI-slop mold.

display.usage: H1, H2, Hero statements, massive statistics. Use italic variants for emphasis.

mono.usage: Overlines, section numerals (01, 02), metric labels, tags, skills.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Asymmetrical 12-column grid. Visible structural lines (1px border-b/border-r).
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous vertical spacing (py-24, py-32). Dense internal component spacing.
layout_and_spacing.radius: Sharp edges. rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain the brutalist/editorial feel.

navigation.style: Fixed header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70). Exposed bottom border. Links in Geist sans-serif, logo/name in Instrument Serif.

hero.structure: Massive typographic statement. Split layout: Left side huge Serif introduction, Right side monospace grid of animated impact metrics (IDR 2T+, 55%, 5+ projects).
hero.enhancements: Subtle grain overlay. Accent text in Vermillion Orange.

case_studies_grid.style: Bento-style or Masonry grid. No identical squares. Mix tall and wide cards. Hover effect: image scales slightly (1.05) and goes from grayscale to color.
case_studies_grid.data_points: AI LMS, Transfez Remittance, HM Sampoerna decoupling, DANA revamp, Apiary, AI Sales Forecasting, AI Talent Matching.

experience_timeline.style: List view, border-b between items. Left column: Year/Period (Mono). Middle: Role & Company (Display Serif/Sans). Right: Key achievements.
experience_timeline.data_points: Doitpay, Zero One Group, Transfez, Learnext, Asa Ren, MCF.

marquee.usage: Use react-fast-marquee. Massive outline text (text-8xl+) or editorial ribbon (text-sm wide tracking) for Skills & Capabilities.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for premium momentum.
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Framer Motion staggered Y-axis reveals on scroll (y: 40, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom magnetic cursor or simple dot cursor using Framer Motion (Optional but recommended for 'wild' feel).
motion_and_interactions.hover: Text link underline expanson. Button background sweeping transitions.

abstract_architecture_1.description: Modern building architecture with geometric patterns
abstract_architecture_1.placement: Case study background or Hero abstract element

abstract_warm_geometry.description: Abstract geometric shapes with warm orange and red tones

abstract_data_nodes_1.placement: AI LMS or AI Sales Forecasting thumbnail

abstract_data_nodes_2.description: Blue background with lines and dots network
abstract_data_nodes_2.placement: AI Talent Matching or Transfez thumbnail

icons.style: Minimalist, 1.5px stroke width. No filled icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid Inter, Space Grotesk, or purple gradients.
Implement light and dark mode toggling. The design should look incredible in both.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layouts; Shadcn for any interactive dropdowns/forms if necessary.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, filters).
Integrate Framer Motion for scroll reveals and number counters on the Hero metrics.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main layout.
Ensure the design feels raw yet polished: exposed borders (border-collapse look), stark contrasts, large italicized serif headlines paired with tiny uppercase monospace labels.
For the hero animated impact metrics, ensure they count up dynamically using Framer Motion when scrolled into view.
